narrative:
Fairview Park-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 259 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.3 percentage points.
